terms.definition: Protecting nature, including trees, animals, and their habitats, so they are not destroyed.
terms.exampleUsage: Conservation of forests helps protect the animals that live in them.

terms.definition: Cutting down large numbers of trees and clearing forests, usually to make space for farms or buildings.
terms.exampleUsage: Deforestation is causing many animals to lose their homes.

terms.definition: A movement where villagers hugged trees to stop them from being cut down. It started in Uttarakhand in 1973.
terms.exampleUsage: The Chipko Movement showed that ordinary people can protect nature.

terms.definition: A community in Rajasthan known for protecting trees and animals as part of their way of life for over 500 years.
terms.exampleUsage: The Bishnoi people never cut green trees because they believe all life is sacred.

terms.definition: A desert tree found in Rajasthan that gives shade, food (pods), and fodder for animals. It is the state tree of Rajasthan.
terms.exampleUsage: The Khejri tree can survive even in hot desert conditions.

terms.definition: A gas in the air that all living things need to breathe. Trees make oxygen and release it into the air.
terms.exampleUsage: Trees produce oxygen which we need to breathe and stay alive.

terms.definition: When soil is washed away or blown away because there are no tree roots to hold it in place.
terms.exampleUsage: Cutting down trees leads to soil erosion during heavy rains.

terms.definition: A tree planting festival celebrated in India during the first week of July. 'Van' means forest and 'Mahotsav' means festival.
terms.exampleUsage: During Van Mahotsav, our school planted 50 new trees.

terms.definition: Giving up something very important, even your own life, to protect what you believe in.
terms.exampleUsage: Amrita Devi made a great sacrifice to protect the khejri trees.

terms.definition: The process by which trees and plants release water vapour from their leaves into the air, helping form clouds.
terms.exampleUsage: Through transpiration, forests help bring rain to the area.
